sentences.arabic: زَارَ أَحْمَدُ مَطْعَمًا تَقْلِيدِيًّا مَعَ عَائِلَتِهِ لَيْلَةَ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je sinoć posjetio tradicionalni restoran sa svojom porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed visited a traditional restaurant with his family last night.

sentences.translation: Naručili su miješano meso sa roštilja i rižu sa šafranom.
sentences.translationEn: They ordered mixed grills and saffron rice.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّعَامُ لَذِيذًا وَالْجَوُّ هَادِئًا وَمُرِيحًا.
sentences.translation: Hrana je bila ukusna, a atmosfera mirna i ugodna.
sentences.translationEn: The food was delicious and the atmosphere was calm and comfortable.
